name: Workable
description: Manage Workable ATS (candidates, jobs, members, stages, comments) from any AI agent. 9 tools, Bearer token auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Workable Hiring API (per-subdomain — yoursub.workable.com/spi/v3).

**Setup**:
1. Log into your Workable account → top-right avatar → **Integrations → Workable API → Generate access token**.
2. Note your subdomain (the part before `.workable.com`).
3. Set `WORKABLE_SUBDOMAIN` and `WORKABLE_ACCESS_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${WORKABLE_ACCESS_TOKEN}`.

**Per-tenant baseUrl**: `https://${WORKABLE_SUBDOMAIN}.workable.com/spi/v3`. Substituted at import time.

**Job 'shortcode'**: Workable identifies jobs by short hash strings (`AC123ABCDE`) in URLs/API. Use `workable_list_jobs` to discover.

**Candidate disqualification**: writes use a stage `disqualified` and a `disqualification_reason_id`. Reasons are configured per-account.

**Pagination**: cursor-based — response has `paging.next` (full URL). Pass back the URL's `since_id` or use the full cursor query.

**Rate limits**: 300 req/min per account. 429 → exponential.

**Out of scope here**: assessments, video interviews, requisitions, payroll fields (Workable HR Cloud is separate).

tools.name: workable_account_info
tools.description: Returns the account info (subdomain, name, summary).

tools.name: workable_list_jobs
tools.description: List jobs. Filter by state (published, draft, closed, archived).

since_id.description: Cursor — only newer than this job shortcode.

tools.name: workable_get_job
tools.description: Get a single job by shortcode with full description + requirements + benefits.

tools.name: workable_list_candidates
tools.description: List candidates for a job. Filter by stage, state, created date.

tools.name: workable_get_candidate
tools.description: Get one candidate by ID with full profile + answers to job questions.

tools.name: workable_create_candidate
tools.description: Create a candidate on a job (sourced / referral). Required: candidate.firstname, candidate.lastname, candidate.email.

sourced.description: If true, marks as sourced; otherwise applied.

candidate.description: Candidate object {firstname, lastname, email, phone, address, headline, summary, resume_url, ...}.

tools.name: workable_move_candidate_stage
tools.description: Move a candidate to a different pipeline stage.

tools.name: workable_disqualify_candidate
tools.description: Disqualify (reject) a candidate with a reason.

tools.name: workable_list_stages
tools.description: List pipeline stages defined in the account.
